title: Proper application of sunscreen: How to apply it - Canada.ca
content:
## Proper application of sunscreen: How to apply it
With described video

## Transcript - Proper application of sunscreen: How to apply
A cartoon image of a beach by the ocean appears on screen.
Text on screen: Sun screen tips.
A tube of sun screen appears in the sand.
Text on screen: Choose a sunscreen with a broad spectrum that protects against both UVA and UVB rays.
It should have an SPF rating of 30 or more and be water resistant. Check the expiry date.
Text on Screen: Apply sunscreen 15 minutes before going outside and re-apply every 2 hours or more often.
Text on screen: Canada.ca/sun-safety
